plugin_interface.shortDescription: Multi-agent software-delivery pipeline: orchestration, planning, implementation, review, and verification.
plugin_interface.longDescription: AgentCorp is a suite of specialized Agent Skills that run a full software-delivery pipeline. A Delivery Orchestrator classifies the task and routes each phase to the right role — planning, implementation, multiple independent code reviewers, and layered verification — with explicit gates and an assignment/receipt evidence trail between phases.
defaultPrompt: Use $delivery-orchestrator to deliver this task end to end
Use $code-review-lead to run an evidence-based code review
